queries.question: Give me all stringers and editors paid 2000.
queries.sql:
SELECT Authors.Name 
FROM Authors
WHERE (Authors.Classification = "Stringer" OR Authors.Classification = "Editor") AND Authors.Payment = 2000
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?authors a :Authors .
  ?authors p:name ?name .
  ?authors p:Classification ?classification_w .
  ?authors p:Classification ?classification_w2 .
  ?authors p:Payment ?payment_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?classification_w) = "Stringer" || STR(?classification_w2) = "Editor")) && (STR(?payment_w) = "2000" || STR(?payment_w) = "2000.0")))
}
